headline: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
summary: Find deals on Apple products despite recent price increases. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 (512GB) is currently $150 off at Amazon. Originally priced at $1,699, this offers a notable saving.

headline: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments
summary: Code in an iOS 27 beta reveals a 'Restricted Mode' for financed iPhones. Apple could disable apps if users miss payments on their devices. This follows reports of a new 'Apple Upgrade' financing program.

headline: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
summary: Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget MacBook Neo. The new model will feature a new processor and increased memory. Plans also include refreshing the device with new color options.

headline: Here's what Samsung's smart glasses actually look like
summary: Samsung revealed its upcoming smart glasses designs and initial specifications. The glasses boast an impressive 9-hour battery life. Developed with Google and eyewear brands, they are due to launch this fall.

headline: Preorder a New Samsung Galaxy Z Device, and Get Up to a $350 Amazon Gift Card for Free
summary: Preorders are now live for the new line of Samsung Galaxy Z foldable phones. Customers can receive up to a $350 Amazon Gift Card with their preorder. This offer applies to the latest Android devices.

headline: The 4K-Ready MSI Codex Z2 GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Gaming PC Drops to $1,699 After a $600 Discount
summary: The 4K-ready MSI Codex Z2 Gaming PC with an RTX 5070 Ti is now available at a discount. Get it for $1,699, a significant $600 off its regular price. This powerful gaming rig usually sells for over $2000.

headline: Don't Watch the Brilliantly Disgusting Clayface Trailer While You're Eating
summary: DC Studios released a new, visually striking trailer for Clayface. The trailer is described as 'brilliantly disgusting.' It's advised not to watch it during meal times due to its content.

headline: Today's Best Deals: Tomodachi Life, Kindle Colorsoft, and 8BitDo Pro 3 Wireless Controller
summary: Explore today's top deals on various electronics and games. Savings include Tomodachi Life, Kindle Colorsoft, and an 8BitDo Pro 3 controller. Find major discounts on other video games and LEGO Star Wars.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: Lissie Harper criticizes the potential early release of prisoners. Concerns arise as two of PC Harper's killers could be freed. Andy Burnham is set to review the controversial early release scheme.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Bus fares across most of England will be capped at £2 starting January. The government implemented this policy to help with the cost of living. The initiative aims to provide financial breathing room for commuters.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
summary: Ukrainian drones struck Russian online retailer Wildberries again. Logistics hubs in Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were hit overnight. This marks the second drone attack on the company's facilities.

headline: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests
summary: Former Southern Water boss Matthew Wright is among four charged. They are accused of manipulating water quality test results. The alleged scheme aimed to save the firm millions in penalties.
